productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Black Belt
description: In a simple braided style, this sleek linked fabric belt from lino perros looks great with denim trousers and dresses. Length: 108 cm Made of synthetic fabric in a braided pattern Braided panels linked together with buckles that are looped through leather patches Leather panels at the buckle and tail for durability Long buckle with a tang clasp and seven holes to customise Fit One fixed leather loop to hold the tail in place Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
